elements.text:
[detect-amd]
exten => s,1,NoOp(--- Iniciando Detecção de Caixa Postal ---)
exten => s,n,Set(TARGET_CAMPAIGN_ID=${CAMPAIGN_ID})
exten => s,n,Set(TARGET_CAMPAIGN_PHONE=${CAMPAIGN_PHONE})
exten => s,n,AMD()
exten => s,n,NoOp(Resultado AMD: \${AMDSTATUS} - Causa: \${AMDCAUSE})
exten => s,n,UserEvent(AMDResult, CAMPAIGN_ID: \${TARGET_CAMPAIGN_ID}, CAMPAIGN_PHONE: \${TARGET_CAMPAIGN_PHONE}, AMDSTATUS: \${AMDSTATUS})
exten => s,n,GotoIf(\$["\${AMDSTATUS}" = "HUMAN"]?human:machine)
exten => s,n(machine),NoOp(Caixa Postal Detectada - Desligando)
exten => s,n,Hangup()
exten => s,n(human),NoOp(Humano Detectado - Direcionando)
exten => s,n,Goto(\${TARGET_CONTEXT},\${TARGET_EXTEN},\${TARGET_PRIORITY})
